name: box
hints: You are inside a box with a piece of metal.
GET METAL - the metal piece may be useful as a tool or key component.
Take the piece of metal. Find a way out of the box - try OPEN BOX, GET OUT, or GO OUT.
notes: Inside a box/crate containing a piece of metal. The metal piece is useful as a tool or for puzzles. Must find a way out of the box.
